data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
select sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description
,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) as name_fp ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as position_name
,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.last_payment_amount ,((select loan_interest_rate from sc_lon_m_int_step_rate where effective_date = ( select max(effective_date) from sc_lon_m_int_step_rate where loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type) * 100) as loan_interest_rate
--เงินเดือน ,(select salary_amount from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) as salary_amount --เงินประจำตำแหน่ง ,nvl((select case academic_salary when 9900 then academic_salary * 2 when 5600 then academic_salary * 2 else academic_salary end as academic_salary from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ),0) as academic_salary --ค่าตอบแทน ,nvl((select remuneration_amount from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ),0) as remuneration_amount ,(select (nvl(case academic_salary when 9900 then academic_salary * 2 when 5600 then academic_salary * 2 else academic_salary end,0) + nvl(remuneration_amount,0) + nvl(salary_amount,0)) as exp from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) as exp_amount
,decode(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex,'M','ชาย','หญิง') as sex ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as agetext_live ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date ,substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)),1,30) as age_mem_text ,mem_request_amount - total_old_loan - total_oldint - fee_amount - buy_share - decode(sc_lon_m_loan_request.payint_firstperiod_status,'1',interest_first,0) as paid_amount /*รับจริง*/
,nvl(( select sum( item_amount ) from sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc where sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ),0) as sum_inc_amount /*รายได้*/
,nvl(( select sum( item_amount ) from sc_lon_m_req_salnet_exp where sc_lon_m_req_salnet_exp.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ),0) as sum_exp_amount /*รายจ่าย*/
--รายเดือนรวมหักกลบ ,(select sum(tab.money_amount) from ( select 1 as sort ,0 as seq_no ,'เงินฝาก' as receive_description ,monthdep as money_amount from sc_lon_m_loan_request sr where sr.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no
union all
select 1 as sort ,1 as seq_no ,'เงินกู้' as receive_description ,monthloan as money_amount from sc_lon_m_loan_request sr where sr.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no
union all
select 1 as sort ,2 as seq_no ,'หุ้น' as receive_description ,monthshare as money_amount from sc_lon_m_loan_request sr where sr.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no
union all
select 2 as sort , sc_lon_m_req_salnet_exp.seq_no , sc_lon_m_ucf_req_salnet_type.item_code_desc as receive_description , sc_lon_m_req_salnet_exp.item_amount as money_amount from sc_lon_m_req_salnet_exp , sc_lon_m_ucf_req_salnet_type where sc_lon_m_req_salnet_exp.item_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_req_salnet_type.item_code and sc_lon_m_req_salnet_exp.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no
union all
select 3 as sort ,0 as seq_no ,'ชำระ/งวด' as receive_description ,period_payment_amount as money_amount from sc_lon_m_loan_request sr where sr.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no
union all
select 4 as sort ,0 as seq_no ,'ดอกเบี้ยงวดแรก' as receive_description ,interest_first as money_amount from sc_lon_m_loan_request sr where sr.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no
union all
select 5 as sort ,0 as seq_no ,'ค่าสงเคราะห์ศพรายเดือน' as receive_description ,PKA_LON_CALCLOAN_PERMIT.fp_get_insur_skk_amount (sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no,sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date) as money_amount from sc_lon_m_loan_request sr where sr.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no
) tab where tab.money_amount > 0) as month
,(select salary_amount + nvl(sc_lon_m_loan_request.academic_salary,0) from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) * 0.30 as percent_salary_30
,nvl(sc_lon_m_loan_request.balance_salary,0) as balance_salary ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.remark ,(select sc_mem_m_member_work_info.working_date from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long <> 'ข้าราชการบำนาญ') as working_date ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext((select sc_mem_m_member_work_info.working_date from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long <> 'ข้าราชการบำนาญ')) as age_working_text --สวัสดิการ ,(select sum(tab.amount) from ( select 0 as sort ,'ทุนเรือนหุ้น' as description ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock as amount from sc_mem_m_share_mem where sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
union all
select 1 as sort ,sc_mem_m_insure_rule.insurance_desc as description ,sc_mem_m_insure.insurance_cost as amount from sc_mem_m_insure ,sc_mem_m_insure_rule where sc_mem_m_insure.insurance_type = sc_mem_m_insure_rule.insurance_type and sc_mem_m_insure.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_insure.insurance_status = '0'
union all
select 2 as sort ,sc_mem_m_member_crem_type.crem_name_shot as description ,sc_mem_m_member_crem_type.default_cost as amount from sc_mem_m_member_cremation ,sc_mem_m_member_crem_type where sc_mem_m_member_cremation.crem_type = sc_mem_m_member_crem_type.crem_type and sc_mem_m_member_cremation.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
union all
select 3 as sort ,'สวัสดิการสมาชิกเสียชีวิต' as description ,pka_lon_calcloan_permit.fp_get_welf_amount ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ) as amount from dual
union all
select 4 as sort ,'สมาคมฌาปณกิจครูสุรินทร์' as description ,pka_lon_calcloan_permit.fp_get_insur_skk ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ) as amount from dual
union all
select 5 as sort ,'ชมรมเจ้าหน้าที่' as description ,pka_lon_calcloan_permit.fp_get_insur_chomrom ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ) as amount from dual ) tab ) as insurance_amount
,sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ,nvl((select sum(sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_of_loan) as pricipal_balance from sc_lon_m_loan_history where sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target <> 1),0) as amount_not_clear
,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.retire_date ,PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext( PKA_SRV_DATETIME.fp_monthsafter( sysdate , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.retire_date )) as agetext_retire ,decode(sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long,'ข้าราชการบำนาญ','<>',pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext( pka_srv_datetime.fp_monthsafter(sc_mem_m_member_work_info.working_date,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.retire_date)) ) as age_retire_text
,(select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(si_security_user.membership_no) from si_security_user where si_security_user.user_id = sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id) as entry_id
,nvl((select sum(sc_lon_m_req_fee.prakan_atm) from sc_lon_m_req_fee ,sc_lon_m_ucf_fee where sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type and sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.insur_status = '1' --สมัครใหม่ and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no),0) as fee_insure_1
,nvl((select sum(principal_balance_of_loan) from sc_lon_m_loan_history where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and clear_target = '1'),0) as pricipal_balance_1 ,nvl((select sum(interest_amount) from sc_lon_m_loan_history where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and clear_target = '1'),0) as interest_amount_1
,(select period_recrieve from sc_mem_m_share_mem where sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) as period_recrieve
,(select sum(tab.total) from ( select loan_requestment_no ,(principal_balance_of_loan + interest_amount) as total from sc_lon_m_loan_history where 1=1 and clear_target = '1'
union all
select loan_requestment_no ,buy_share as total from sc_lon_m_loan_request where 1=1
union all
select sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no ,sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount as total from sc_lon_m_req_fee ,sc_lon_m_ucf_fee where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type
union all
select sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first as total from sc_lon_m_loan_request where 1=1
) tab where 1=1 and tab.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no) as paid_total
,greatest( nvl(( SELECT SUM(smp.paid_amount) FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid smp WHERE smp.type_pay_money = 'TRD' AND smp.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ), 0), 0 ) AS paid_amount_dep
, ( select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type <> '02' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no not in ( select sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no from sc_dep_m_creditor where 1=1 and sc_dep_m_creditor.close_status <> 'C' and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_name not like '%%เพื่อ%%' and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_name not like '%%โดย%%' and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_name not like '%%-%%' ) ) AS none_dep
from sc_lon_m_loan_request ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type /*WHERE*/ --and loan_requestment_no = '6710000005'
